message:
feat: implement real modal buttons with proper arrow navigation

Creates true modal experience with separate button area and navigation:

Real Modal Buttons:
- Remove save/cancel from list items/sections
- Add dedicated button area at bottom with separator line
- Buttons are outside the sections content area
- Professional modal styling with proper focus states

Arrow Navigation to Buttons:
- Navigate down past last field moves to button area
- Navigate up from buttons returns to last field
- Navigate between Save and Cancel buttons with arrows
- Enter key activates focused button (save or cancel)

Button Focus States:
- Save button: green background when focused
- Cancel button: red background when focused
- Gray text when not focused
- Clear visual indication of which button is active

Navigation Flow:
1. Arrow keys navigate through all config fields in sections
2. Down arrow past last field moves focus to Save button
3. Up/down arrows navigate between Save and Cancel buttons
4. Up arrow from Save returns to last config field
5. Enter activates focused button

This creates proper modal UX where buttons feel like modal actions,
not configuration fields, while maintaining full keyboard navigation.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
